headline: Morgan Rogers
body: 🔵🇪🇸 Morgan Rogers: “I’ve had a few conversations with Xabi Alonso. It’s important for me to be here that I need to understand what the manager’s like, how he is, how he wants to operate”. “It very much fits with the way I see the game...”. 👀
raw_text:
🔵🇪🇸 Morgan Rogers: “I’ve had a few conversations with Xabi Alonso. It’s important for me to be here that I need to understand what the manager’s like, how he is, how he wants to operate”.

“It very much fits with the way I see the game...”. 👀
text:
🔵🇪🇸 Morgan Rogers: “I’ve had a few conversations with Xabi Alonso. It’s important for me to be here that I need to understand what the manager’s like, how he is, how he wants to operate”.

“It very much fits with the way I see the game...”. 👀
draft_caption:
🎩 MANAGER- MORGAN ROGERS LINKED WITH THE ASTON VILLA JOB.
